analysis: Adding a margin ranking loss alongside the standard Cross Entropy loss. This enforces that the score of the correct boundary for a markdown cell is at least `margin` larger than any incorrect boundary score. Also increased the training subset from 30,000 to 50,000 notebooks. The combination explicitly guides the model to learn a stricter rank separation between matched and non-matched boundaries. The validation Kendall tau score improved further from 0.8381 to 0.8437.
